## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] Strict workspace Clippy passes
- [ ] All-feature and no-default-feature tests pass
- [ ] Native permission/lifecycle tests pass where applicable
- [ ] Documentation and `cargo deny check` pass
- [ ] Wire changes include golden vectors and a compatibility decision
- [ ] Unsafe or shared-memory invariant changes received independent review
